subcodes.first_line: God willing, through His gracious favor may ye be detached from all else save Him, be turned towards Him and hold fast as doth such a one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت حق از ما سواه منقطع باشید و باو ناظر و متمسک بر مثل آنجناب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
